title: 🌿 L-Systems (Lindenmayer Systems)
name: L-Systems (Lindenmayer Systems)
what_it_is: Recursive string-replacement systems that model natural growth—used to simulate plants, fungi, lightning, and coral.
how_to_use: horns that grow like L-systems—symmetrical, recursive branching from crown to tip
forest of fungal light—every stalk a recursive L-system bloom
animation_behavior: Smooth growing recursion, curling growths, stepwise expansion over time ---
